sections.heading: Pathway
sections.content: {"pathway_id":"oral_cavity_early_stage","title":"Oral Cavity Cancer: T1-2,N0","branching_basis":["Clinical T stage","Clinical N stage","Surgical candidacy","Depth of invasion"],"nodes":[{"criteria":"T1-2, N0 oral cavity cancer, patient is a surgical candidate","options":[{"type":"surgery","label":"Resection of primary ± neck dissection (guided by tumor location, depth of invasion, and imaging)","preference":"preferred","recommendation":"category 2A","linked_regimen_ids":[]},{"type":"surgery","label":"Resection of primary + SLN biopsy","preference":"other recommended","recommendation":"category 2A","linked_regimen_ids":[]},{"type":"radiation","label":"Definitive RT","preference":"other recommended","recommendation":"category 2A","linked_regimen_ids":[]}],"adjuvant_logic":{"applies":true,"summary":"Adjuvant treatment is determined by pathologic findings from neck dissection. For SLN pN0, no further neck surgery is needed. If SLN pN+ or SLN identification unsuccessful, a neck dissection is performed. Pathologic assessment of the resected primary and neck determines the need for adjuvant RT or systemic therapy/RT based on the presence of adverse pathologic features (extranodal extension, positive margins, close margins, pT3/pT4, pN2/pN3, nodal disease in levels IV/V, perineural, vascular, or lymphatic invasion). For no positive nodes and no adverse features: observation. For one positive node without adverse features: consider RT. For adverse features without positive margin: consider RT (for other risk features) or systemic therapy/RT (for extranodal extension ± positive margin). For positive margin: re-resection if feasible and consider RT if negative margins, or consider systemic therapy/RT [OR-2]."}},{"criteria":"T1-2, N0 oral cavity cancer, patient is not a surgical candidate or declines surgery","options":[{"type":"radiation","label":"Definitive RT","preference":"preferred","recommendation":"category 2A","linked_regimen_ids":[]}],"adjuvant_logic":{"applies":false,"summary":"No adjuvant therapy is applicable after definitive RT. Follow-up includes post-treatment neck evaluation [FOLL-A 2 of 2]."}}]}

sections.heading: Pathway
sections.content: {"pathway_id":"oral_cavity_locally_advanced_resectable","title":"Oral Cavity Cancer: T3,N0 or T1-3,N1-3 or T4a,N0-3 (Resectable)","branching_basis":["Clinical T stage","Clinical N stage","Resectability","PD-L1 CPS status","N stage for neoadjuvant pembrolizumab"],"nodes":[{"criteria":"T3,N0; T1-3,N1-3; T4a,N0-3; surgery preferred","options":[{"type":"surgery","label":"Resection of primary ± ipsilateral or bilateral neck dissection","preference":"preferred","recommendation":"category 2A","linked_regimen_ids":[]},{"type":"systemic_therapy","label":"Neoadjuvant pembrolizumab (if PD-L1 positive [CPS ≥ 1], except for N3 disease)","preference":"other recommended","recommendation":"category 2A","linked_regimen_ids":["neoadjuvant_pembrolizumab"]},{"type":"clinical_trial","label":"Clinical trials","preference":"other recommended","recommendation":"N/A","linked_regimen_ids":[]}],"adjuvant_logic":{"applies":true,"summary":"Adjuvant treatment is based on pathologic findings from surgery. For N0,N1,N2a-b,N3: resection of primary ± ipsilateral or bilateral neck dissection. For N2c (bilateral): resection of primary and bilateral neck dissection. No adverse pathologic features: consider RT. Adverse pathologic features: if extranodal extension ± positive margin → systemic therapy/RT (category 1); if other risk features → RT or consider systemic therapy/RT. Positive margin: systemic therapy/RT (category 1) or re-resection if feasible and consider RT if negative margins. If neoadjuvant pembrolizumab was received: RT + pembrolizumab (with cisplatin if extranodal extension and/or positive margin) followed by adjuvant pembrolizumab [OR-3]."}},{"criteria":"Selected patients who decline surgery","options":[{"type":"radiation","label":"Treatment for Very Advanced Head and Neck Cancer (ADV-1)","preference":"preferred","recommendation":"category 2A","linked_regimen_ids":[]}],"adjuvant_logic":{"applies":false,"summary":"These patients are managed under the very advanced cancer pathway."}}]}

sections.heading: Pathway
sections.content: {"pathway_id":"oropharynx_p16_negative_early_stage","title":"Oropharyngeal Cancer (p16-negative): T1-2,N0-1","branching_basis":["HPV/p16 status","Clinical T stage","Clinical N stage","Surgical candidacy","PD-L1 CPS status"],"nodes":[{"criteria":"T1-2, N0-1, p16-negative, patient is a candidate for either primary modality","options":[{"type":"surgery","label":"Resection of primary and ipsilateral or bilateral neck dissection","preference":"other recommended","recommendation":"category 2A","linked_regimen_ids":[]},{"type":"radiation","label":"Definitive RT","preference":"other recommended","recommendation":"category 2A","linked_regimen_ids":[]},{"type":"systemic_therapy","label":"Concurr"}],"adjuvant_logic":null}]}

nodes.label: T1-2, N0 oral cavity cancer, patient is a surgical candidate
T1-2, N0 oral cavity cancer, patient is not a surgical candidate or declines surgery
Resection of primary ± neck dissection (guided by tumor location, depth of invasion, and imaging) [preferred, category 2A]
Resection of primary + SLN biopsy [other recommended, category 2A]
Definitive RT [other recommended, category 2A]
Definitive RT [preferred, category 2A]
Adjuvant treatment decision based on pathologic findings from neck dissection and primary
Observation (no positive nodes, no adverse features)
Consider RT (one positive node without adverse features)
Consider RT (for other risk features) or systemic therapy/RT (for extranodal extension ± positive margin)
Systemic therapy/RT (for positive margin) or re-resection if feasible and RT if negative margins

edges.label: No positive nodes and no adverse features
One positive node without adverse features
Adverse features (extranodal extension ± positive margin) or other risk features
Positive margin (re-resection if feasible or systemic therapy/RT)

flowcharts.title: Oral Cavity Cancer: T3,N0 or T1-3,N1-3 or T4a,N0-3 (Resectable)

nodes.label: T3,N0; T1-3,N1-3; T4a,N0-3; surgery preferred
Selected patients who decline surgery
Resection of primary ± ipsilateral or bilateral neck dissection [preferred, category 2A]
Neoadjuvant pembrolizumab (if PD-L1 positive [CPS ≥ 1], except for N3) [other recommended, category 2A]
Clinical trials [other recommended]
Treatment for Very Advanced Head and Neck Cancer (ADV-1) [preferred, category 2A]
Adjuvant treatment based on pathologic findings (including neoadjuvant pembrolizumab context)
No adverse features: consider RT
Adverse features (extranodal extension ± positive margin): systemic therapy/RT (category 1)
Other risk features: RT or consider systemic therapy/RT
Positive margin: systemic therapy/RT (category 1) or re-resection if feasible and RT if negative margins
If neoadjuvant pembrolizumab received: RT + pembrolizumab (with cisplatin if ENE/+) then adjuvant pembrolizumab

edges.label: After neoadjuvant pembrolizumab and surgery – pathologic assessment
Other risk features (e.g., pT3/T4, pN2/N3, PNI, LVI)

nodes.label: T1-2, N0-1, p16-negative, patient is a candidate for either primary modality
Resection of primary and ipsilateral or bilateral neck dissection [other recommended, category 2A]
Definitive RT [other recommended, category 2A]
Concurr [incomplete]
